title: Gumira resinosa
taxonomy: Gumira resinosa is classified within the family Proteaceae. This classification places it among other flowering plants that are native to Australia and New Zealand. Gumira resinosa is further divided into the genus Lomatia, which comprises several species of flowering plants.
